input.content:
Subject: Welcome to [SaaS Platform Name]! 🎉 Let's Get You Started

---

Hi [Customer Name],

Thank you for signing up for [SaaS Platform Name]! We're thrilled to have you on board.

We're confident that [SaaS Platform Name] will help you [main benefit]. To ensure you get the most out of your account, we've put together some resources to help you get started.

**Getting Started:**

1. Complete Your Profile
   Set up your profile information to personalize your experience and help us serve you better.
   → [Link to Profile Setup]

2. Explore Our Features
   Check out our comprehensive feature tour to understand the capabilities available to you.
   → [Link to Feature Tour]

3. Review Documentation
   Our help center includes detailed guides, tutorials, and best practices for every feature.
   → [Link to Documentation]

**Quick Start Tips:**

• [Tip 1 - First action users should take]
• [Tip 2 - Key feature to explore]
• [Tip 3 - How to achieve first success]

**Need Help?**

We're here to support you every step of the way:

• Chat with our support team via the in-app chat feature
• Browse our FAQ section: [Link to FAQ]
• Schedule a personalized demo: [Link to Calendar]
• Email us directly: support@[domain].com

**What's Next?**

Over the next few days, you'll receive additional emails with tips, best practices, and updates on features that can help you maximize your success with [SaaS Platform Name].

**Exclusive Offer:**

As a new user, we're offering you [discount/bonus feature] for the first [time period]. No coupon needed—it's automatically applied to your account.

We're excited to have you as part of our community of [number]+ satisfied customers. If you have any questions or feedback, please don't hesitate to reach out.

Welcome aboard!

Best regards,

[Sender Name]
[Title]
[SaaS Platform Name] Team

---

P.S. Don't forget to follow us on social media for tips, updates, and special offers:
[Social Media Links]

---

© [Year] [SaaS Platform Name]. All rights reserved.
[Company Address] | [Privacy Policy Link] | [Terms of Service Link]

tool_attempts.result_summary: Permission denied: Tool 'Write' requires user permission (no interactive user in trial)
